CrawlConcurrencyPipelineState.description: State model derived from CrawlConcurrencyPipeline TLA+ spec

ValidStages.description: Verifier for invariant ValidStages from CrawlConcurrencyPipeline spec

TypeInvariant.description: Verifier for invariant TypeInvariant from CrawlConcurrencyPipeline spec

BoundedExecution.description: Verifier for invariant BoundedExecution from CrawlConcurrencyPipeline spec

DefaultApplied.description: Verifier for invariant DefaultApplied from CrawlConcurrencyPipeline spec

ValidationCorrect.message:
ValidationCorrect violation: validation_ok =>
        (parsed_value >= MIN_CONCURRENCY /\ parsed_value <= MAX_CONCURRENCY)
ValidationCorrect.description: Verifier for invariant ValidationCorrect from CrawlConcurrencyPipeline spec

ValuePreservedToCmdCrawl.description: Verifier for invariant ValuePreservedToCmdCrawl from CrawlConcurrencyPipeline spec

OrchestratorPreservesValue.description: Verifier for invariant OrchestratorPreservesValue from CrawlConcurrencyPipeline spec

SweepReceivesCorrectValue.description: Verifier for invariant SweepReceivesCorrectValue from CrawlConcurrencyPipeline spec

NoErrorOnValidUserInput.message:
NoErrorOnValidUserInput violation: (user_provided
        /\ raw_concurrency >= MIN_CONCURRENCY
        /\ raw_concurrency <= MAX_CONCURRENCY) =>
      ...
NoErrorOnValidUserInput.description: Verifier for invariant NoErrorOnValidUserInput from CrawlConcurrencyPipeline spec

NoErrorOnDefault.description: Verifier for invariant NoErrorOnDefault from CrawlConcurrencyPipeline spec

assert_ValidStages.description: Test assertion for ValidStages from CrawlConcurrencyPipeline spec

assert_TypeInvariant.condition:
and stage in ValidStages
    and step_count >= 0
assert_TypeInvariant.message:
Assertion failed: TypeInvariant — /\ stage \in ValidStages
    /\ step_count >= 0
assert_TypeInvariant.description: Test assertion for TypeInvariant from CrawlConcurrencyPipeline spec

assert_BoundedExecution.description: Test assertion for BoundedExecution from CrawlConcurrencyPipeline spec

assert_DefaultApplied.condition:
(~user_provided and stage not in {"Idle", "Parsing"}) implies
        parsed_value = DEFAULT_CONCURRENCY
assert_DefaultApplied.message:
Assertion failed: DefaultApplied — (~user_provided /\ stage \notin {"Idle", "Parsing"}) =>
        parsed_value = DEFAULT_CONCURRENCY
assert_DefaultApplied.description: Test assertion for DefaultApplied from CrawlConcurrencyPipeline spec

assert_ValidationCorrect.condition:
validation_ok implies
        (parsed_value >= MIN_CONCURRENCY and parsed_value <= MAX_CONCURRENCY)
assert_ValidationCorrect.message:
Assertion failed: ValidationCorrect — validation_ok =>
        (parsed_value >= MIN_CONCURRENCY /\ parsed_value <= MAX_CONCURRENCY)
assert_ValidationCorrect.description: Test assertion for ValidationCorrect from CrawlConcurrencyPipeline spec

assert_ValuePreservedToCmdCrawl.message:
Assertion failed: ValuePreservedToCmdCrawl — stage \in {"OrchestratorInit", "SweepAsync", "Complete"} =>
        cmd_crawl_value = parsed_value
assert_ValuePreservedToCmdCrawl.description: Test assertion for ValuePreservedToCmdCrawl from CrawlConcurrencyPipeline spec

assert_OrchestratorPreservesValue.message:
Assertion failed: OrchestratorPreservesValue — stage \in {"SweepAsync", "Complete"} =>
        orchestrator_value = cmd_crawl_value
assert_OrchestratorPreservesValue.description: Test assertion for OrchestratorPreservesValue from CrawlConcurrencyPipeline spec

assert_SweepReceivesCorrectValue.message: Assertion failed: SweepReceivesCorrectValue — stage = "Complete" => sweep_value = parsed_value
assert_SweepReceivesCorrectValue.description: Test assertion for SweepReceivesCorrectValue from CrawlConcurrencyPipeline spec

assert_NoErrorOnValidUserInput.condition:
(user_provided
        and raw_concurrency >= MIN_CONCURRENCY
        and raw_concurrency <= MAX_CONCURRENCY) implies
        stage /= "Error"
assert_NoErrorOnValidUserInput.message:
Assertion failed: NoErrorOnValidUserInput — (user_provided
        /\ raw_concurrency >= MIN_CONCURRENCY
        /\ raw_concurrency <= MAX_CONCURRENCY) =>
      ...
assert_NoErrorOnValidUserInput.description: Test assertion for NoErrorOnValidUserInput from CrawlConcurrencyPipeline spec

assert_NoErrorOnDefault.description: Test assertion for NoErrorOnDefault from CrawlConcurrencyPipeline spec
